description: Fast cruise price discovery via VacationsToGo. Use this for quick pricing questions, general availability, or when the user asks what cruises are available without needing live CB inventory. Returns results in seconds with no browser session required. Prices are indicative (VTG vendor), not the exact CB booking price. Use odysseus_search when the client is ready to book or needs live CB pricing.

input_schema.cruiseLine: string | null — MUST be an exact value from cruise_line_options list (e.g. 'Norwegian', 'Royal Caribbean', 'Carnival'). Do NOT use full brand names like 'Norwegian Cruise Line' — use only the short form from the list. Use null for all lines.
input_schema.region: string | null — MUST be an exact value from region_options list (e.g. 'Caribbean', 'Bahamas', 'Alaska'). Use null for all regions.
input_schema.minNights: number | null — minimum trip length in nights, or null for any
input_schema.maxNights: number | null — maximum trip length in nights, or null for any
input_schema.startMonth: string | null — earliest departure month in YYYYMM format (e.g. '202604'), or null for current month
input_schema.endMonth: string | null — latest departure month in YYYYMM format (e.g. '202606'), or null for ~4 months out

output_schema.results: array of deals with cruiseLine, ship, date, fromPort, toPort, nights, ourPrice, youSave, region

thoughts_stream_label: Looking up cruise prices on VacationsToGo...
